forecast-period.text: Clear. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending south to southeasterly in the evening.

The chance of fog in the early morning. Sunny day. Light winds becoming southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then tending east to southeasterly in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching 22 to 27.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Sunny. The chance of morning fog about the southern Fleurieu Peninsula. Light winds becoming southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon then tending east to southeasterly in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Mostly sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. The chance of a thunderstorm on the eastern slopes in the afternoon. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 18 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Clear. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon and evening.

Sunny. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early morning then becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

The chance of fog in the early morning. Sunny day. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending east to northeasterly during the morning then turning south to southeasterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming northwest to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then tending southeast to southwesterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 18 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Clear. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h.

The chance of fog in the early morning. Mostly sunny day. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light before dawn then becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Sunny. Light winds becoming northwest to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then tending southeast to southwesterly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Clear. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon and evening.

Sunny. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then tending southwesterly in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny day. Light winds becoming northwest to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then tending southeast to southwesterly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 30s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Clear. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening.

The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h shifting west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the early afternoon then tending southeast to southwesterly in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching 24 to 29.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog near the coast. Light winds becoming northwest to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then tending southeast to southwesterly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching 26 to 31.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. The chance of a thunderstorm near the eastern border in the afternoon. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Mostly clear. Light winds.
Sunny. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]
Sunny. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 30s.
Sunny. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 30s.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower. The chance of a thunderstorm near the eastern border in the afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 18 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 30s.
Clear. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Sunny. The chance of fog in the west in the early morning. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon then tending south to southwesterly in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming northwest to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon then tending southeast to southwesterly in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 30s.
Sunny. The chance of morning fog in the south. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 30s.

Sunny morning. Slight chance of a shower in the afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 30s.

Mostly clear. Slight chance of a shower in the north, becoming less likely later this evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the evening.

Mostly sunny. The chance of fog in the south in the early morning. Slight chance of a shower in the north in the late morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Light winds becoming southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon then becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Mostly sunny. The chance of fog in the west in the early morning. Light winds becoming southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Mostly sunny. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower in the east in the afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 18 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, becoming less likely later this evening. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending east to southeasterly in the late evening.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the late morning and afternoon. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending south to southeasterly before dawn then tending east to southeasterly in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 16 and 20 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
No Rating
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 9 [Very High]
Mostly sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 15 and 20 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Mostly sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending east to northeasterly during the morning then becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 16 and 20 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower in the morning and afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 17 and 20 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Mostly clear. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Streaky Bay. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light before dawn then becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 5:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 9 [Very High]

Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Streaky Bay. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending east to northeasterly in the early morning then tending east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower south of Streaky Bay in the morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly during the morning then tending southeasterly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 18 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 30s.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower south of Streaky Bay in the afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm east of Ceduna in the afternoon. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly during the morning then tending south to southeasterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 17 and 20 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 30s.
Clear. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h.

The chance of fog in the early morning. Sunny day. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early morning then becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower in the south in the afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 18 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 30s.

Sunny morning. Slight chance of a shower in the afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon. Light winds becoming northwest to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then tending south to southeasterly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 18 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 30s.
Clear. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h.

The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:20am to 4:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Sunny morning. Slight chance of a shower in the afternoon. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly during the afternoon then tending southeast to southwesterly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then shifting east to southeasterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
Mostly clear. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower east of Stuart Highway in the late morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light before dawn then becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 16 and 20 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.
No Rating
Sun protection 10:00am to 5:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 10 [Very High]

Mostly sunny. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light before dawn then becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 17 and 20 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 30s.
Mostly sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 18 and 21 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 30s.

Mostly sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the day then becoming northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 20 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 30s.
Mostly clear. Slight chance of a shower south of Leigh Creek, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h.

Mostly sunny. Medium chance of showers about the Gammon Ranges in the late morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 18 and 23 with daytime temperatures reaching 28 to 33.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:50am to 4:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 10 [Very High]
Sunny. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 17 and 22 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower about the Gammon Ranges in the morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds east to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 18 and 23 with daytime temperatures reaching 30 to 35.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower south of Yunta, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 19 and 23 with daytime temperatures reaching 30 to 35.
